overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a character running along a rain-soaked beachside sidewalk during a nighttime thunderstorm. The character navigates past commercial buildings, a fenced tennis court, and street furniture while lightning periodically illuminates the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside commercial sidewalk with tennis court

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wet sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated signage reading WWW.SHOPOCEANVIEW.COM and a For Sale sign
green chain-link fence enclosing illuminated tennis courts
wooden picnic tables with large dark umbrellas
tall street lamps casting reflections on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character running along a rain-soaked sidewalk at night. A commercial building with bright signage stands on the left while a fenced tennis court with outdoor seating occupies the right. Street lamps illuminate the wet concrete as the character passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky and reflects off the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward, approaching a bus shelter while passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: transit shelter with yellow trim and illuminated interior
vertical decorative banner hanging from poles along the fence

segments.scene_description: As the character continues running, a dramatic lightning flash brightens the stormy sky. The tennis court area falls behind as a bus shelter comes into view ahead. The commercial building recedes into the distance on the left while decorative banners appear along the right side of the path.

events.description: character turns left off the main sidewalk toward the street with parked cars

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the street while slowing near parked vehicles

entered.detail: dark colored sedans parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The character passes the bus shelter and turns left toward a street lined with parked cars. The sidewalk opens up into a wider area with the tennis court and shops now behind. The street banner moves closer on the right as the character approaches the parked vehicles along the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked beachside sidewalk that shifts from a crowded commercial strip to a quieter street lined with parked cars. It begins with the character running past a brightly lit commercial building and a fenced tennis court, moving through the glow of street lamps and past oncoming pedestrians. As the character continues forward, a dramatic flash of lightning illuminates the stormy sky, causing the tennis court to recede while a bus shelter and decorative banners emerge ahead. The scene then opens up as the character passes the shelter and turns left, leaving the shops behind to enter a wider area. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the curb, moving closer to the street banners and the row of vehicles parked along the roadside.
